channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 25: England beats Mexico; Norway eliminates Brazil
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: At least 19 people killed in Sri Lanka prison clashes
item.description: This is a breaking news story.

item.title: Impeachment trial of Philippines VP Sara Duterte begins
item.description: Impeachment trial of Philippines VP Sara Duterte begins

item.title: Moment Israeli soldier hurls stun grenade into Palestinians’ car
item.description: Security camera video appears to show an Israeli soldier throwing a stun grenade into a car carrying young Palestinians.

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi makes landfall on US Pacific islands
item.description: Local authorities on Rota, part of the Northern Mariana Islands, say they have received reports of 'major damages'.

item.title: Portugal vs Spain: World Cup last 16 – Ronaldo, Yamal, start and prediction
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo's Portugal face Lamine Yamal-powered Spain in an Iberian football derby in the World Cup round of 16.

item.title: China missile test draws criticism from Australia, New Zealand, Japan
item.description: Countries raise concerns after Chinese military test-launches ballistic missile from submarine in the Pacific Ocean.

item.title: Funeral procession for Iran’s slain Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei under way
item.description: Iranians mourn along procession route before burial in Mashhad during weeklong ceremonies.

item.title: Khamenei’s funeral procession moves through Tehran
item.description: Crowds filled the streets of Tehran as the funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, began.

item.title: Russian attacks on Ukraine kill 11 on eve of NATO summit, authorities say
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy had warned of a likely attack ahead of meeting with US President Donald Trump.

item.title: Sudan’s maternity wards reopen, bringing hope amid war struggles
item.description: Sudan’s maternity wards reopen, bringing hope and safe deliveries to mothers navigating post-war economic hardships.

item.title: Is the US really preparing to drop Israel?
item.description: With relations between Israel and the US fraught, some are speculating whether special relationship may be at an end.

item.title: Haaland inspired Norway stun Brazil in historic World Cup knockout win
item.description: Norway fans celebrate with viking rows from outside the stadium in New Jersey to Oslo as the team stuns Brazil.

item.title: Haaland rewrites history by carrying Norway into World Cup quarterfinals
item.description: Haaland has emerged from the shadows of Messi, Mbappe and Ronaldo to rewrite World Cup history for Norway.

item.title: Which teams are in the World Cup quarterfinals, and what’s the schedule?
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinals lineup as it builds, with match kickoff times and locations.

item.title: Bellingham inspires 10-man England to beat Mexico 3-2 in last-16 thriller
item.description: England hands Mexico their first World Cup loss at Estadio Azteca, winning 3-2 to reach the 2026 quarterfinals.

item.title: OPEC+ countries say they will expand monthly oil production
item.description: Seven OPEC+ members, including Saudi Arabia and Russia, to increase output by 188,000 barrels per day.

item.title: Sports stadium becomes home for victims of the Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: A sports stadium in La Guaira state has been turned into a makeshift home and logistics centre for thousands of victims.

item.title: Ronaldo’s last World Cup? We will see, says Portugal star before Spain clash
item.description: 'I will finish when I choose,' Ronaldo reveals amid speculation about his World Cup future ahead of the last-16 match.

item.title: How conflict minerals fuel war in eastern DR Congo amid US sanctions
item.description: The move underscores growing scrutiny of the conflict mineral trade fuelling violence in eastern DR Congo.

item.title: Tuareg fighters claim to have shot down a Russian helicopter in Mali
item.description: Tuareg fighters in Mali have released footage claiming to have shot down a Russian Africa Corps Mi-24 helicopter.

item.title: Neymar quits international football after Brazil’s World Cup knockout loss
item.description: The injury-plagued striker converted a penalty but failed to take his team into the last 16 of the FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Belgium ‘astonished’ at FIFA’s U-turn on Balogun red card for USA match
item.description: Belgium's football federation is 'investigating all potential options' to safeguard football after FIFA's U-turn.

item.title: Iran war live: Huge crowd for Khamenei funeral procession in Tehran
item.description: Funeral procession expected to last 10-12 hours and draw millions of mourners in Iran's capital.

item.title: Venezuelan leader marks Independence Day with message of ‘no social unrest’
item.description: Interim President Delcy Rodriguez once again defends her government's handling of the deadly earthquakes on June 24.
